properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is no other Name in heaven, There is no other Name on the earth By which we can be saved, There is no other way, So we worship, You, our King, And give You everything.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There is none like You, Painter of the sky, Bright and morning star, Shine into our lives, There is none like You, Beginning and the end, All-consuming fire, Ignite our hearts again.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There is no other love like Jesus, There is no other friend so true, No other hand of grace, No other hiding place, You're the Lamb of sacrifice, The glory of our lives.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Rock of refuge, holy One, Your love has made us new, Through the ages kingdom come, We will worship You, We will worship You.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: All-consuming fire, Ignite our hearts again.
